chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-124 of 2022 (Fazul Rehman Buriro Vs. The State & others) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of MA No. 3791/2022 09-03-2023. None present for applicant/surety. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional P.G for the State..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Heard. The facts in brief necessary for disposal instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 561-A Cr.P.C are that applicant Fazul Rehman was admitted to interim pre arrest bail by this Court; his bail application was dismissed as not pressed; consequently his bail bond/surety was forfeited by this Court vide order dated 28-03-2022, the applicant/ surety now has sought for recalling the above said order of this Court only to the extent of forfeiture of his bail bond/surety. After dismissal of the bail application as not pressed, legally there was no need for recording forfeiture of bail bond/surety, that too without notice to the applicant/surety in terms of section 514 Cr.P.C being mandatory. Consequently, the subject order is recalled only to the extent of forfeiture of bail bond/surety. The instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Nasim /PA
